---
title: "Annie Reynolds"
---

## Annie Reynolds

### Description

an invalid?

### Biography

Probably a candidate for admission to an infirmary or home of some kind.

### Letters

- [To Catharine Elgie, March 15 [1898]](../letters/3373_To_Catharine_Elgie.html)

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
